name: Thread Creation into a Process Different from the Initial One
notes: This rule triggers when a process is creating a thread into another process.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001845) CreateRemoteThread

when an event matches any of the following Thread creation by a Process Launched From a Temp Directory, Thread creation into a System Process, BB: CreateRemoteThread excluded cases, Thread creation into lsass Process
TD_list: APPLY Thread Creation into a Process Different from the Initial One on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001845) CreateRemoteThread

AND NOT when an event matches any of the following Thread creation by a Process Launched From a Temp Directory, Thread creation into a System Process, BB: CreateRemoteThread excluded cases, Thread creation into lsass Process
RED_list: Event name: Process Created a Thread into Another Process
Event description: Process Created a Thread into Another Process
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
